description_long: This is a compact bathroom vanity unit featuring a rectangular white ceramic sink mounted atop a light wood-finished cabinet. The front of the cabinet has two doors that open to reveal interior storage space, as seen in one view with the doors open. One side of the cabinet is equipped with three open shelves, providing additional accessible storage for toiletries or towels. The sink is fitted with a modern, matte black faucet and a matching drain fixture. The cabinet's construction appears to be primarily wood or wood laminate, with visible metal hinges and fasteners inside. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for urban bathrooms or compact washrooms.
description: A modern bathroom vanity with a white ceramic sink, light wood cabinet, and open shelving on one side. Features include double doors, interior storage, and a matte black faucet.
description_view_0: This view shows the open shelving on the side of the cabinet, with three wooden shelves beneath the white sink.
description_view_1: This view displays the front of the cabinet with two closed wood-finished doors and the white sink with a black faucet on top.
description_view_2: This side view highlights the plain wood panel of the cabinet and the overhanging white sink.
description_view_3: This rear view shows the cabinet doors open, revealing the interior storage space and visible metal hinges and fasteners.
